title: What is Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: What is Rebuild? Post by AzureX » Sun Aug 02, 2009 10:38 pm After watching the camrip of 2.0, I decided to read the wikipedia article about what exactly happened in 2.0, i came across this section: SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Legendary » Sun Aug 02, 2009 10:41 pm This has been discussed. There's two possibilites. 1, the less likely, is that this IS a sequel. 2, the more likely, is that Kaworu and Shinji have met in Webuild. I refer you to my thread about Rebuild, here http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7263 which suggests one way they might have met before.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Aug 02, 2009 10:42 pm To me rebuild is just a re-telling of the series and it exists in another universe. didn't click the spoiler.

[]: Post by AzureX » Sun Aug 02, 2009 10:46 pm Hmm, my search didnt turn up this topic before but i probably didnt have enough keywords or something like that. Thanks for the link. thought it was kinda weird that nobody else found this, but as that is not the case i am relieved.

[]: Post by Sachi » Sun Aug 02, 2009 10:49 pm AzureX wrote: thought it was kinda weird that nobody else found this, but as that is not the case i am relieved.

[]: Post by Axell » Sun Aug 02, 2009 11:37 pm Don't say his name!

[]: Re: What is Rebuild? [Spoliers] Post by NAveryW » Sun Aug 02, 2009 11:38 pm AzureX wrote: Now my question is, is rebuild a true rebuild of the original series or a continuation of the original, in one of Shinji's alternate existences?

[]: Post by Fredrick2003 » Sun Aug 02, 2009 11:45 pm I thought it was pretty well established that Rebuild is a completely separate story. If it is connected to the original I will be saddened :(

[]: Post by Marduk » Mon Aug 03, 2009 12:06 pm Nah. Rebuild is the demon love child of Retake and Anno

[]: Post by schismatics » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:16 pm Marduk wrote: Nah. Rebuild is the demon love child of Retake and Anno

[]: Post by JimmyWolk » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:18 pm schismatics wrote: We're going to get Rei dumping paint on her head and Asuka getting boned????? I am now totally pumped for 3.0.

[]: Post by AzureX » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:25 pm i see that topics dont die so hard here. While we're at it how about we throw some mudkips into the storyline?

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:26 pm AzureX wrote: i see that topics dont die so hard here. While we're at it how about we throw some mudkips into the storyline?

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Aug 03, 2009 1:35 pm By the way things are going, I think Anno is making it up as he is going along. He could have the whole Rebuild movie series taking place in a can of Misato's beer.

[]: Post by schismatics » Mon Aug 03, 2009 2:36 pm Sammaeloo wrote: By the way things are going, I think Anno is making it up as he is going along. He could have the whole Rebuild movie series taking place in a can of Misato's beer.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:46 pm At the end of the original series, there is reference to instrumentality involving the unification of alternate existences (correct me if im wrong i didnt understand that part very well).

[]: Post by AzureX » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:49 pm then what was the thing at the end with the alternate universe?

[]: Post by Legendary » Mon Aug 03, 2009 6:13 pm That was Rei showing Shinji a POSSIBLE reality, where the people had the same form but different roles because they behaved differently. It was no more than an elaborate dream.

[]: Post by AzureX » Mon Aug 03, 2009 6:24 pm Is it remotely possible it might be connected?

[]: Post by Kozar927 » Mon Aug 03, 2009 9:01 pm AzureX wrote: Is it remotely possible it might be connected?
